subject: [PATCH] x86/boot: Use 5-level paging trampoline in place if possible

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the trampoline hack code not getting proper testing and potentially 'rotting over time'.

2026-03-04.patch_summary: Proposal to use a 5-level paging trampoline in place if possible, raising concerns about testing and maintenance.
